prompt: Ear check: “ils‿ont” (Z sound) vs “ils sont” (S sound) —
options: Z = they have, S = they are
Z = they are, S = they have
explain: The liaison consonant carries the meaning. TCF loves this.

prompt: Track 40 done. What can you now do?
options: Build real sentences in present, near future and past — the logic of French is yours
explain: This was the whole point of the spine. From here it's volume: input, book work, speaking.
je viens de finir = I just finished.

prompt: The two past-tense helper verbs are…
explain: avoir for most, être for the movement club.
on va, on a, on est.

prompt: The negation of “j'ai le temps” is…
options: je n'ai pas de temps le
explain: ne … pas around ai; le stays.
